title: Music Directors and Composers
description: Conduct, direct, plan, and lead instrumental or vocal performances by musical artists or groups, such as orchestras, bands, choirs, and glee clubs; or create original works of music.

tasks.text: Use gestures to shape the music being played, communicating desired tempo, phrasing, tone, color, pitch, volume, and other performance aspects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct groups at rehearsals and live or recorded performances to achieve desired effects such as tonal and harmonic balance dynamics, rhythm, and tempo.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Study scores to learn the music in detail, and to develop interpretations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Apply elements of music theory to create musical and tonal structures, including harmonies and melodies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Consider such factors as ensemble size and abilities, availability of scores, and the need for musical variety, to select music to be performed.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Determine voices, instruments, harmonic structures, rhythms, tempos, and tone balances required to achieve the effects desired in a musical composition.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Experiment with different sounds, and types and pieces of music, using synthesizers and computers as necessary to test and evaluate ideas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Transcribe ideas for musical compositions into musical notation, using instruments, pen and paper, or computers.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Audition and select performers for musical presentations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and schedule rehearsals and performances, and arrange details such as locations, accompanists, and instrumentalists.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write musical scores for orchestras, bands, choral groups, or individual instrumentalists or vocalists, using knowledge of music theory and of instrumental and vocal capabilities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Position members within groups to obtain balance among instrumental or vocal sections.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform administrative tasks such as applying for grants, developing budgets, negotiating contracts, and designing and printing programs and other promotional materials.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with producers and directors to define the nature and placement of film or television music.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Meet with soloists and concertmasters to discuss and prepare for performances.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Fill in details of orchestral sketches, such as adding vocal parts to scores.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Explore and develop musical ideas based on sources such as imagination or sounds in the environment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write music for commercial mediums, including advertising jingles or film soundtracks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Transpose music from one voice or instrument to another to accommodate particular musicians.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Rewrite original musical scores in different musical styles by changing rhythms, harmonies, or tempos.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Arrange music composed by others, changing the music to achieve desired effects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assign and review staff work in such areas as scoring, arranging, and copying music, and vocal coaching.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Study films or scripts to determine how musical scores can be used to create desired effects or moods.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Transcribe musical compositions and melodic lines to adapt them to a particular group, or to create a particular musical style.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Create original musical forms, or write within circumscribed musical forms such as sonatas, symphonies, or operas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collaborate with other colleagues, such as copyists, to complete final scores.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Copy parts from scores for individual performers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate and organize tours, or hire touring companies to arrange concert dates, venues, accommodations, and transportation for longer tours.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Produce recordings of music.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Stay abreast of the latest trends in music and music technology.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
